_comment_general: Full example datapack file for the Species disguise system. ALL fields are optional. To activate, place a file at 'data/<namespace>/species_disguises/<entity_path>.json' (e.g. 'data/minecraft/species_disguises/cow.json' targets minecraft:cow). This example sits in 'disguise_data_examples/' so the reload listener skips it — copy/rename to use.
_comment_texture: Cosmetic: re-skin the disguise model. ResourceLocation pointing to a PNG.
_comment_sounds: Cosmetic: override hurt/death/ambient sounds. Hurt+death fire when the wearer takes damage / dies. Ambient plays roughly every 5 seconds while wearing the mask.
_comment_name_tag: Cosmetic: floating label above the disguise body.
_comment_world_scale: Cosmetic: visual scale in the world (separate from inventory). 1.0 = unchanged, <1 shrinks, >1 grows.
_comment_glow_color: Cosmetic: outline ARGB color when wearer has Glowing effect (Spectral Arrow / /effect give @s glowing). Hex string with optional '#'.
_comment_inventory_scale: Topology: inventory preview scale, multiplied on top of auto-fit. Use to fine-tune large/small models.
_comment_inventory_y_offset: Topology: vertical translate (world units, pre-scale) applied during inventory render. Negative shifts model DOWN.
_comment_camera_size_min: Topology: camera distance floor in blocks. Use for streaming-segment disguises (Gum Worm-class) where the union AABB starts small.
_comment_wearer_effects: Cosmetic: status effects automatically applied while the mask is worn and removed on un-equip / swap. Each entry: 'id' required; 'amplifier' (default 0 = level I), 'duration' in ticks (default -1 = infinite), 'visible' particles (default true), 'show_icon' HUD icon (default true), 'ambient' (default false). Equivalent to /effect give @s <id> infinite <amplifier> <hide_particles>.
